perf_hint: the panel is a sliver of the frame and reads nothing but the uniform, so `meter` is the cheapest preset avz ships — if a render is slow, the resolution is what costs, not this

params.name: anchor
params.description: Which of the nine grid positions the meter sits in, the text card's vocabulary.

params.name: orientation
params.description: Whether the meter stands and fills upward, or lies down and fills to the right.

params.name: length
params.description: The meter's long side, as a fraction of the frame edge it runs along.

params.name: thickness
params.description: The meter's short side, as a fraction of the frame's short edge.

params.name: margin
params.description: The gap between the meter and the frame's edges, as a fraction of the short edge.

params.name: segments
params.description: How many LED segments divide the meter; 0 is a continuous, unbroken bar.

params.name: track
params.description: How visible the unlit remainder of the meter is, so quiet passages still show the scale.

params.name: brightness
params.description: How much light the lit segments put out.
